mapper.select: SELECT attendance_id, employee_no, work_date, check_in_at, check_out_at, work_minutes, status, note FROM platform_v3.at_attendance WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND work_date = CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.at_attendance (employee_no, work_date, check_in_at, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), NOW(), COALESCE(#{status}, 'NORMAL'), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.at_attendance SET check_in_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE attendance_id = #{attendanceId} AND check_in_at IS NULL
UPDATE platform_v3.at_attendance SET check_out_at = NOW(), work_minutes = #{workMinutes}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE attendance_id = #{attendanceId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.attendance_id, a.employee_no, a.work_date, a.check_in_at, a.check_out_at, a.work_minutes, a.status, a.note, e.employee_name, e.dept_id FROM platform_v3.org_employee e LEFT JOIN platform_v3.at_attendance a ON a.employee_no = e.employee_no AND a.work_date = CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY e.employee_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.at_attendance (employee_no, work_date, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), 'LEAVE', NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (employee_no, work_date) DO UPDATE SET status = 'LEAVE', updated_at = NOW()
